# DR-AI-Workforce API - Complete Documentation

> Supabase Edge Functions for agile project management. POST-only API with action-based routing. All endpoints accept JSON with an `action` field to determine operation (create, get, list, update, delete). Responses use consistent format: `{success: boolean, data?: object, error?: {code, message, details?}, requestId: string}`.

---

# Response Format

All API responses follow a consistent JSON structure for predictable parsing.

## Success Response

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    // Response payload varies by endpoint
  },
  "requestId": "1735123456789-abc123def",
  "meta": {
    "processingTimeMs": 45
  }
}
```

## Error Response

```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "ERROR_CODE",
    "message": "Human-readable error message",
    "details": ["field-level errors if applicable"],
    "retryable": true
  },
  "requestId": "1735123456789-abc123def",
  "timestamp": "2025-12-26T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

## Error Codes

| Code | HTTP Status | Description | Retryable |
|------|-------------|-------------|-----------|
| `INVALID_INPUT` | 400 | Validation failed | No |
| `INVALID_JSON` | 400 | Request body is not valid JSON | No |
| `NOT_FOUND` | 404 | Resource not found | No |
| `METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED` | 405 | Only POST method is supported | No |
| `INTERNAL_ERROR` | 500 | Server error | Yes |

## HTTP Status Codes

| Status | Usage |
|--------|-------|
| 200 | Successful GET, LIST, UPDATE, DELETE |
| 201 | Successful CREATE |
| 400 | Invalid request |
| 404 | Resource not found |
| 405 | Wrong HTTP method |
| 500 | Server error |

---

# Common Patterns

## Action-Based Routing

All endpoints use POST with `action` field:

```json
{"action": "list", "project_id": "uuid", "filters": {...}}
```

| Action | Description | Response Code |
|--------|-------------|---------------|
| `create` | Create single entity | 201 |
| `create_batch` | Create multiple entities | 201 |
| `get` | Retrieve single entity | 200 |
| `list` | List with filters | 200 |
| `update` | Partial update | 200 |
| `delete` | Soft delete | 200 |

## Pagination

```json
{"pagination": {"page": 1, "limit": 50}}
```

- `page`: 1-indexed, default 1
- `limit`: 1-100, default 50

## Filtering

```json
{
  "filters": {
    "status": ["todo", "in_progress"],
    "priority": ["high"],
    "is_active": true,
    "tags": ["frontend"]
  }
}
```

## Sorting

```json
{"sort": {"field": "created_at", "order": "desc"}}
```

## Batch Operations

```json
{
  "action": "create_batch",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "items": [{"title": "Item 1"}, {"title": "Item 2"}]
}
```

Maximum 100 items per request.

---

# api-projects

POST `/functions/v1/api-projects`

Project management with team and statistics.

## Actions

### create

```json
{
  "action": "create",
  "name": "My Project",
  "description": "Description",
  "category": "development",
  "tags": ["react", "typescript"],
  "is_active": true,
  "git_repository_url": "https://github.com/org/repo",
  "jira_url": "https://company.atlassian.net/browse/PROJ"
}
```

Required: `name`, `description`

### get

```json
{
  "action": "get",
  "project_id": "uuid"
}
```

Returns project with stats: team_member_count, active_sprint, sprint_count, meeting_count, task_counts by status.

### list

```json
{
  "action": "list",
  "filters": {"is_active": true, "category": "development", "tags": ["react"]},
  "pagination": {"page": 1, "limit": 50},
  "sort": {"field": "created_at", "order": "desc"}
}
```

Sort fields: name, created_at, updated_at

### update

```json
{
  "action": "update",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "data": {"name": "Updated Name", "is_active": false}
}
```

---

# api-tasks

POST `/functions/v1/api-tasks`

Development tasks with assignees and sprints.

## Actions

### create

```json
{
  "action": "create",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "title": "Task title",
  "description": "Description",
  "status": "todo",
  "priority": "medium",
  "task_type": "feature",
  "story_points": 5,
  "estimated_hours": 8,
  "tags": ["react"],
  "assigned_to": "uuid",
  "sprint_id": "uuid",
  "feature_id": "uuid"
}
```

Required: `project_id`, `title`

### get

```json
{
  "action": "get",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "task_id": "uuid"
}
```

Returns task with assignee, sprint, parent_task, subtasks_count.

### list

```json
{
  "action": "list",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "filters": {
    "status": ["todo", "in_progress"],
    "priority": ["high"],
    "task_type": ["feature"],
    "sprint_id": "uuid",
    "assigned_to": "uuid",
    "feature_id": "uuid",
    "tags": ["frontend"]
  },
  "pagination": {"page": 1, "limit": 50},
  "sort": {"field": "priority", "order": "desc"}
}
```

Sort fields: priority, created_at, story_points, updated_at, title

### update

```json
{
  "action": "update",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "task_id": "uuid",
  "data": {"status": "in_progress", "priority": "high", "feature_id": "uuid"}
}
```

## Enums

Status: todo, in_progress, testing, in_review, done, blocked
Priority: low, medium, high, critical, urgent
Task Type: feature, bug, chore, spike, improvement

---

# api-sprints

POST `/functions/v1/api-sprints`

Sprint planning with velocity tracking.

## Actions

### create

```json
{
  "action": "create",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "name": "Sprint 1",
  "description": "First sprint",
  "start_date": "2024-01-15",
  "end_date": "2024-01-29",
  "status": "planning",
  "goals": ["Complete auth", "Setup CI/CD"],
  "planned_points": 21
}
```

Required: `project_id`, `name`, `start_date`, `end_date`

### get

```json
{
  "action": "get",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "sprint_id": "uuid"
}
```

Returns sprint with task_stats: total_tasks, total_points, points_by_status.

### list

```json
{
  "action": "list",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "filters": {"status": ["active", "planning"]},
  "pagination": {"page": 1, "limit": 10},
  "sort": {"field": "start_date", "order": "desc"}
}
```

Sort fields: start_date, end_date, created_at, name

### update

```json
{
  "action": "update",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "sprint_id": "uuid",
  "data": {"status": "completed", "completed_points": 21, "velocity": 21}
}
```

## Enums

Status: planning, active, completed, cancelled

---

# api-meetings

POST `/functions/v1/api-meetings`

Meeting transcripts management.

## Actions

### create

```json
{
  "action": "create",
  "title": "Sprint Planning",
  "transcript_text": "Meeting content...",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "description": "Weekly planning",
  "meeting_date": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z",
  "tags": ["sprint", "planning"],
  "is_public": false
}
```

Required: `title`, `transcript_text`
Optional: `project_id` (meetings can exist without project)

### get

```json
{
  "action": "get",
  "meeting_id": "uuid"
}
```

Returns meeting with generated_documents_count.

### list

```json
{
  "action": "list",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "filters": {
    "date_from": "2024-01-01",
    "date_to": "2024-12-31",
    "is_public": false,
    "tags": ["sprint"]
  },
  "pagination": {"page": 1, "limit": 20},
  "sort": {"field": "meeting_date", "order": "desc"}
}
```

Sort fields: meeting_date, created_at, title

### update

```json
{
  "action": "update",
  "meeting_id": "uuid",
  "data": {"title": "Updated Title", "tags": ["sprint", "q1"]}
}
```

---

# api-backlog-items

POST `/functions/v1/api-backlog-items`

Backlog items with batch create support.

## Actions

### create

```json
{
  "action": "create",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "title": "Feature title",
  "description": "Description",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    {"id": "ac-1", "description": "Criterion", "completed": false}
  ],
  "story_points": 3,
  "priority": "medium",
  "business_value": 7,
  "technical_complexity": 5,
  "tags": ["frontend"],
  "status": "draft"
}
```

Required: `project_id`, `title`

### create_batch

```json
{
  "action": "create_batch",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "items": [
    {"title": "Item 1", "priority": "high"},
    {"title": "Item 2", "priority": "medium"}
  ]
}
```

### get

```json
{
  "action": "get",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "item_id": "uuid"
}
```

### list

```json
{
  "action": "list",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "filters": {"status": ["draft", "ready"], "priority": ["high"]},
  "pagination": {"page": 1, "limit": 50},
  "sort": {"field": "position", "order": "asc"}
}
```

Sort fields: position, created_at, priority, story_points

### update

```json
{
  "action": "update",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "item_id": "uuid",
  "data": {"status": "ready", "priority": "high"}
}
```

## Enums

Status: draft, ready, in_refinement, approved
Priority: low, medium, high, critical, urgent

---

# api-features

POST `/functions/v1/api-features`

Features with batch create, computed fields from views, and soft delete.

## Actions

### create

```json
{
  "action": "create",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "title": "User Authentication",
  "description": "Implement login",
  "status": "draft",
  "priority": "high",
  "story_points": 8,
  "estimated_hours": 40,
  "tags": ["auth", "security"],
  "ready_criteria": [
    {"id": "rc-1", "description": "Login form validated", "completed": false}
  ],
  "dependencies": [
    {"id": "dep-1", "feature_id": "uuid", "title": "Database Setup", "type": "blocks"}
  ],
  "backlog_item_id": "uuid"
}
```

Required: `project_id`, `title`

### create_batch

```json
{
  "action": "create_batch",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "items": [
    {"title": "Feature A", "status": "draft", "priority": "high", "story_points": 8},
    {"title": "Feature B", "status": "ready", "priority": "medium", "story_points": 5}
  ]
}
```

### get

```json
{
  "action": "get",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "feature_id": "uuid"
}
```

Returns feature with computed fields: epic_title, task_count, completed_task_count, linked_documents_count, linked_sprints_count, attachments_count.

### list

```json
{
  "action": "list",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "filters": {
    "status": ["draft", "ready"],
    "priority": ["high", "critical"],
    "tags": ["frontend"],
    "backlog_item_id": "uuid"
  },
  "pagination": {"page": 1, "limit": 20},
  "sort": {"field": "position", "order": "asc"}
}
```

Sort fields: position, created_at, priority, story_points, status

### update

```json
{
  "action": "update",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "feature_id": "uuid",
  "data": {"status": "in_progress", "story_points": 13}
}
```

### delete

```json
{
  "action": "delete",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "feature_id": "uuid"
}
```

Soft delete (sets deleted_at timestamp).

## Enums

Status: draft, ready, in_progress, done
Priority: low, medium, high, critical, urgent

---

# api-task-comments

POST `/functions/v1/api-task-comments`

Task comments with author-only editing. No delete operation by design.

## Actions

### create

```json
{
  "action": "create",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "task_id": "uuid",
  "author_id": "uuid",
  "content": "Comment content",
  "mentioned_members": ["uuid"]
}
```

Required: `project_id`, `task_id`, `author_id`, `content`

### list

```json
{
  "action": "list",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "task_id": "uuid",
  "pagination": {"page": 1, "limit": 50},
  "sort": {"field": "created_at", "order": "desc"}
}
```

Returns comments with author info (name, email, avatar_url, headline).

Sort fields: created_at, updated_at

### update

```json
{
  "action": "update",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "comment_id": "uuid",
  "author_id": "uuid",
  "data": {"content": "Updated content", "mentioned_members": ["uuid"]}
}
```

Returns 403 FORBIDDEN if author_id doesn't match the comment's original author.

## Business Rules

- **No delete operation**: Comments cannot be deleted
- **Author-only editing**: Only original author can update
- **Task validation**: Task must exist before creating comment

---

# AI Document Generation Endpoints

All document generation endpoints use OpenAI to process meeting transcripts.

## Common Request Format

```json
{
  "content": "Transcript text...",
  "project_id": "uuid",
  "meeting_transcript_id": "uuid",
  "user_id": "uuid",
  "system_prompt": "Optional custom prompt",
  "previous_response_id": "resp_xxx"
}
```

## Common Response Format

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "document": "Generated markdown content...",
  "response_id": "resp_xxx"
}
```

## Endpoints

- `create-prd`: Generate Product Requirements Documents
- `create-user-story`: Generate User Stories
- `create-meeting-notes`: Generate structured meeting summaries
- `create-technical-specs`: Generate technical specifications
- `create-test-cases`: Generate test scenarios
- `create-unit-tests`: Generate unit test code

---

# Integration Endpoints

## sync-github-prs

Synchronize GitHub pull requests to the system.

## upload-to-s3

Upload files directly to AWS S3.

## upload-to-presigned-s3

Upload files using presigned URLs for security.

## generate-presigned-download-url

Generate secure S3 download URLs.

---

# Utility Endpoints

## accessibility-test

Run accessibility tests on URLs.

## service-call-to-markdown

Convert service call logs to markdown documentation.

---

# Quick Reference

## Base URL

```
https://<project-ref>.supabase.co/functions/v1/<endpoint>
```

## Headers

```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
Content-Type: application/json
```

## cURL Template

```bash
curl -X POST 'https://<project-ref>.supabase.co/functions/v1/api-tasks' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"action": "list", "project_id": "uuid"}'
```
